meta.title: The Consequences of the Emerging American-Iranian Nuclear
meta.description: Lee Smith and Efraim Inbar discuss the impact of the  emerging American-Iranian nuclear deal. - Captured Live on Ustream at http://www.ustream.tv/channel/hudson-institute
